    Struct VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>

    Represents an individual vertex object.

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public struct VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS> : IVertexBuilder, IEquatable<VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>> where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial where TvS : struct, IVertexSkinning
    Type Parameters
    TvG

    The vertex fragment type with Position, Normal and Tangent.

    Valid types are:
    TvM

    The vertex fragment type with Colors, Texture Coordinates, and custom attributes.

    Valid types are:
    TvS

    The vertex fragment type with Skin Joint Weights.

    Valid types are:

    VertexBuilder(in TvG, in TvM, in TvS)
    VertexBuilder(in TvG, in TvS)
